channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-03 07:50 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The Tesla office feels like a modern-day computer museum as you walk past generations of vehicles, w...
item.description: The Tesla office feels like a modern-day computer museum as you walk past generations of vehicles, which are technically computers with wheels. Guests often ask what I am working on. “Technically, wherever photons touch those machines.” For people who work on digital computer systems, the computer is often a box. But in our world, the computer can move and must navigate weather, traffic, and terrain. Thus, our compute extends beyond ops per second to the surrounding systems that keep it moving. It is hard to go back to working on computers that don’t move once you have experienced one that can move itself.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Voice is used by Starlink right now
item.description: Grok Voice is used by Starlink right now

item.title: @elonmusk: Thought-Controlled Robotics is now very real and it's happening with Neuralink A paralyzed Neuralink...
item.description: Thought-Controlled Robotics is now very real and it's happening with Neuralink A paralyzed Neuralink patient, Alex Conley, just controlled a robotic arm using only his thoughts - then piloted a drone with his mind Meanwhile, another patient, Jon L. Noble, is now playing World of Warcraft hands-free using only brain signals Two years ago, this was pure science fiction Today, it’s happening in clinical trials Neuralink not just restoring independence, it’s also unlocking new dimensions of human capability Patients who were once completely paralyzed are now interacting with the physical and digital world using nothing but their thoughts The future is not coming. It’s already here

item.title: @elonmusk: This was before Starlink had a name
item.description: This was before Starlink had a name

item.description: Grok 4.3 - excellent intelligence per unit cost

item.title: @elonmusk: often hear people say other vehicles are ruined after driving a Tesla. The data seems to agree.

item.title: @elonmusk: For those who are trying to scam X Ads, use fraudulent credit cards etc. Better make sure your opsec...
item.description: For those who are trying to scam X Ads, use fraudulent credit cards etc. Better make sure your opsec is flawless because we are coming for you. I already got a few IPs, and we are drafting up subpoenas to your ISPs/email providers and more!

item.title: @elonmusk: When a self-proclaimed civil rights organization puts Ayaan Hirsi Ali, of all people, on a "hate wat...
item.description: When a self-proclaimed civil rights organization puts Ayaan Hirsi Ali, of all people, on a "hate watch" list, you know it has been twisted into a grotesque hate group itself. But this was only a sample of its perversions. Ayaan: The SPLC Targeted Me. Now Its Reckoning Has Come.thefp.com/p/ayaan-hirsi-ali-…

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink now in Papua New Guinea! 🇵🇬
item.description: Starlink now in Papua New Guinea! 🇵🇬
